cta.title: Ready to Create Your Masterpiece?
cta.desc: Unleash your creativity and bring your imagination to life with Lavie AI.

home.seoText: Lavie AI is a powerful free AI image generator that allows you to transform text into stunning visual art in seconds. Whether you need photorealistic images, anime illustrations, 3D renders, or digital art, our text-to-image generator delivers exceptional quality without any signup required. Create unlimited AI pictures, backgrounds, and assets for your creative projects today.

q1.q: Is Lavie AI really free to use?
q1.a: Yes! Lavie AI is completely free to use. We offer free daily credits so you can generate images without any payment. No credit card required.

q2.q: Do I need to create an account?
q2.a: No login is required! You can start generating images immediately. However, creating an account lets you save your generation history and access more features.

q3.a: We offer 32 different art styles including Photorealistic, Anime, Oil Painting, Watercolor, Sketch, 3D Render, Cyberpunk, Fantasy, and many more. New styles are added regularly.

q4.q: How fast can I generate an image?
q4.a: With Fast Mode enabled, most images are generated in just a few seconds. Standard generation typically takes 10-30 seconds depending on complexity and server load.

q5.q: Can I use generated images commercially?
q5.a: Yes! Images you generate with Lavie AI can be used for personal and commercial purposes. You retain full ownership of the images you create.

q6.a: Absolutely. We have a zero data retention policy. Your prompts are never stored on our servers after generation is complete and are never used for training AI models.

blog.title: Lavie AI Blog & Guides
blog.description: Discover tips, tutorials, and inspiration for creating stunning AI art.

anime.title: The Ultimate Guide to Anime AI Art Prompts in 2026
anime.excerpt: Master the art of generating breathtaking anime-style images with these proven prompt structures and keywords.
anime.content:
Creating the perfect anime illustration requires more than just typing 'anime style'. To get consistent, high-quality results, you need to understand how the AI interprets specific stylistic keywords.

1. Start with the Medium and Style

Always begin your prompt by defining the exact visual style. Use combinations like 'masterpiece, best quality, ultra-detailed anime illustration, studio ghibli style, makoto shinkai' to set a high baseline for quality.

2. Subject Description

Be specific about your character. Describe their hair color, eye shape, clothing, and pose. For example: '1girl, silver hair flowing in the wind, glowing red eyes, wearing a futuristic cyberpunk jacket, dynamic pose, looking at viewer'.

3. Lighting and Environment

Lighting makes or breaks an image. Add keywords like 'cinematic lighting, rim lighting, lens flare, depth of field'. For the background, be just as descriptive: 'standing in a neon-lit tokyo street, rain puddles reflecting lights, cyberpunk city background'.

Pro Tip: Use the negative prompt to avoid common AI artifacts like 'bad anatomy, extra fingers, missing limbs, blurry'.

ecommerce.title: How to Generate Professional E-commerce Product Backgrounds
ecommerce.excerpt: Save thousands on product photography by using AI to generate realistic, stunning backgrounds for your products.
ecommerce.content:
High-quality product imagery is crucial for e-commerce conversion rates. With Lavie AI, you can generate endless variations of lifestyle and studio backgrounds without renting a studio.

The Setup

When generating backgrounds, you want the focus to remain on where your product will eventually be placed. Use prompts that create natural 'pedestals' or clear spaces.

Studio Prompts

Try this for a clean look: 'Minimalist product photography background, white marble podium, soft pastel pink background, elegant morning sunlight, sharp shadows, 8k, photorealistic'.

Lifestyle Prompts

For a more natural setting: 'Cozy modern living room background, blurred depth of field, wooden coffee table in focus, sunlight streaming through window, indoor plants, soft warm lighting, professional interior photography'.

Integration

Once generated, use your favorite photo editing tool to remove the background of your actual product and place it onto the AI-generated scene. The matching lighting and shadows will make it look like a real photoshoot.

negative.title: Mastering Negative Prompts: What They Are and How to Use Them
negative.excerpt: Sometimes telling the AI what NOT to draw is more important than telling it what to draw. Learn the secrets of negative prompting.
negative.content:
A negative prompt is a set of instructions that tells the AI image generator exactly what elements, styles, or artifacts it should avoid including in the final output. It acts as a filter, cleaning up the generation process.

Why Use Negative Prompts?

AI models are trained on vast datasets that include both masterpieces and poorly drawn images. By using negative prompts, you force the AI to steer clear of the 'bad' data.

The Essential Negative Prompt Formula

For almost every generation, especially human subjects, you should include a base negative prompt like this:
'ugly, duplicate, morbid, mutilated, extra fingers, mutated hands, poorly drawn hands, poorly drawn face, mutation, deformed, blurry, bad anatomy, bad proportions, extra limbs, cloned face, disfigured, gross proportions'

Style-Specific Negatives

If you want a photorealistic image, use negative prompts to avoid artistic styles: 'illustration, painting, cartoon, anime, 3d render, sketch, drawing, watermark, signature'.

Experimenting with negative prompts is just as important as tweaking your main prompt. Don't be afraid to add specific things you want removed, like 'red cars, text, clouds' if they keep appearing unwanted in your generations.
